name: Bogota Savings Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Bogota, NJ offering checking, savings, CDs, and residential mortgages with access to 55,000+ surcharge-free ATMs.
description_long:
Bogota Savings Bank is a traditional community bank headquartered in Bogota, New Jersey. The institution operates as a federally insured depository bank backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government through FDIC insurance, providing deposit protection up to applicable limits.

The bank offers a core suite of consumer banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, certificate of deposit (CD) products with competitive rates, and residential mortgage lending. Their mortgage services span multiple scenarios: first-time home purchases, second homes, upsizing, downsizing, and refinancing of existing mortgages. The bank provides online banking access with password recovery and enrollment options for digital account management.

Bogota Savings Bank distinguishes itself through its partnership with the Allpoint ATM network, providing cardholders access to over 55,000 surcharge-free ATM locations worldwide. The bank explicitly promotes its FDIC insurance status prominently on its website as a core value proposition. The institution maintains a straightforward digital presence without third-party service aggregation or specialized financial products.

As a regional community bank, Bogota Savings Bank is best suited for consumers seeking traditional banking services with local roots and federal deposit protections. The bank does not advertise competitive rate leadership, specialized lending products, or advanced digital-first banking features. Customers should contact the institution directly for current rates, terms, and specific product details, as this information is not publicly displayed on the website. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Surcharge-free ATM access through Allpoint network (55,000+ locations)
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by the U.S. Government
Access to 55,000+ surcharge-free ATMs worldwide through Allpoint network partnership
Online banking platform with account enrollment and password recovery
Comprehensive residential mortgage options covering purchase, refinance, and various home scenarios
Mobile app availability for ATM location finding on iOS and Android
Community bank model with local presence in Bogota, NJ
Diverse checking and savings account options designed for different banking needs
cons: Limited geographic footprint as a regional New Jersey-based bank
No publicly displayed interest rates, APYs, or fee schedules on website
No mention of business banking, investment services, or credit card products
Minimal online presence with sparse product details requiring direct contact for information
No apparent digital-only or neobank features despite online banking availability
best_for: New Jersey residents seeking traditional FDIC-insured community banking
Homebuyers and homeowners interested in residential mortgage financing
Consumers prioritizing federal deposit insurance and local bank relationships
Savers looking for CD products with competitive rates at a community institution
diagnosis: Bogota Savings Bank is best for consumers in the New Jersey area seeking traditional community banking with federal FDIC protection and those in the market for residential mortgage financing. The main caveat is the lack of publicly available rate information and limited digital presence, requiring direct contact with the bank for specific product details, terms, and pricing comparisons.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
